HFCL non-fill at 134 min is explicitly outside risk-config scope: risk-config arbitrates portfolio shape and gate calibration, not order fill/cancel decisions. The order represents committed but unfilled cash; the strategy/execution layer must decide whether to cancel, reprice, or wait. No risk-config lever is the right tool here.
